title: lithocarpus cyrtopodus
intro: Lithocarpus cyrtopodus, also known as the Taiwanese copper beech, is a species of evergreen tree native to Taiwan. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus cyrtopodus include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory and digestive issues.
